a8c6bc59025653b5b17b51547e91d5b0.question: Which type of cloud storage organizes data as individual objects?
a8c6bc59025653b5b17b51547e91d5b0.supporting_fact: Object storage stores data as objects instead of traditional files
a8c6bc59025653b5b17b51547e91d5b0.explanation: Object storage is correct because it stores data as objects.
